context: Australia's 1960 chart reflected a mix of American rock and roll imports and emerging local talent. Elvis Presley dominated with multiple entries, while Rolf Harris's novelty hit 'Tie Me Kangaroo Down Sport' became an enduring Australian cultural touchstone. The chart data was compiled by historian David Kent from state-by-state radio station charts, representing the earliest reliable national data for Australia.

tracks.title: Just a Closer Walk with Thee

What Do You Want to Make Those Eyes at Me For?
